name: GPT-4o
memo: OpenAI flagship multimodal model. Excellent vision + text capabilities.

name: GPT-4o Mini
memo: Cost-efficient small model. Replaces GPT-3.5 Turbo.

name: GPT-4.5
memo: Largest and most capable GPT model. Very high cost, best for research and creative tasks requiring broad knowledge.

name: o1
memo: Advanced reasoning model with chain-of-thought. Excels at math, science, and coding.

name: o3-mini
memo: Cost-efficient reasoning model. Strong at math and code with lower latency than o1.

name: o4-mini
memo: Next-gen compact reasoning model with tool use. Strong agentic capabilities.

name: Claude Opus 4.5
memo: Most capable Claude model. Deep reasoning, exceptional coding, strong creative writing.

name: Claude Sonnet 4.5
memo: Best balance of intelligence and speed in Claude family. Ideal for coding and complex tasks.

name: Claude Haiku 3.5
memo: Fast and affordable. Good for classification, simple generation, and high-throughput tasks.

name: Gemini 2.5 Pro
memo: Google flagship with 1M context and built-in thinking. Top benchmark performer with strong multimodal.

name: Gemini 2.0 Flash
memo: Ultra-fast and cheap. Great for high-volume tasks and real-time applications.

name: Gemini 2.5 Flash
memo: Best value thinking model. Built-in reasoning at Flash-tier pricing.

name: Llama 4 Maverick
memo: 400B MoE with 128 experts, 17B active. Natively multimodal with 1M context. First open MoE model at this scale.

name: Llama 4 Scout
memo: 109B MoE with 16 experts, 17B active. 10M context window. Fits on single H100 in Int4.

name: Llama 3.3 70B
memo: Text-only 70B dense model. Strong multilingual performance at cost of Llama 3.1 405B quality.

name: Llama 3.1 8B
memo: Lightweight model for edge deployment and fine-tuning. Runs on consumer GPUs.

name: Mistral Large
memo: Mistral flagship. Strong multilingual capabilities with efficient inference.

name: Mistral Small
memo: Cost-efficient 24B model. Also open-weight under Apache 2.0. Good for latency-sensitive tasks.

name: Mixtral 8x22B
memo: Large MoE model. 176B total, 44B active per forward pass. Strong coding and math.

name: DeepSeek V3
memo: 671B MoE with 37B active. Extremely cost-efficient via DeepSeek API. Strong at code and Chinese.

name: DeepSeek R1
memo: Reasoning model built on V3 architecture. Chain-of-thought with MIT license. Rivals o1 at fraction of cost.

name: Qwen 3 235B-A22B
memo: 235B MoE with 22B active. Apache 2.0 license. 119 languages. Thinking/non-thinking hybrid modes.

name: Qwen 3 32B
memo: Dense 32B model. Strong reasoning for its size. Thinking/non-thinking hybrid.

name: Qwen 3 8B
memo: Compact 8B dense model. Excellent for edge deployment. Thinking mode available.

name: Grok 3
memo: xAI flagship model. Strong at reasoning and real-time data via X integration.

name: Grok 3 Mini
memo: Lightweight reasoning model. Very cost-effective for its capability level.

name: Command R+
memo: Enterprise-focused with strong RAG capabilities. Excellent at tool use and multi-step retrieval.

name: Command R
memo: Cost-efficient RAG model. Good for multilingual search and simple generation.

name: Nova Pro
memo: Amazon Bedrock native model. Multimodal with video understanding. Cost-effective for AWS users.

name: Nova Lite
memo: Ultra-low cost multimodal model. Best for high-volume simple tasks on AWS.

name: Phi-4
memo: 14B model punching above its weight. Excels at math and reasoning for its size. MIT license.

name: Gemma 3 27B
memo: Google open-weight multimodal model. 128K context, 140+ languages. Good for on-prem deployment.

name: Yi Lightning
memo: Fast MoE-based model with excellent inference speed. Strong Chinese language performance.

name: Claude Haiku 4.5
memo: Fast and capable. Significant upgrade from Haiku 3.5. Good for latency-sensitive agentic tasks.

name: GPT-4.1
memo: 1M context window. Optimized for coding and instruction following. Strong agentic performance.

name: GPT-4.1 Mini
memo: Compact version of GPT-4.1. 1M context at low cost. Good balance for most use cases.

name: GPT-4.1 Nano
memo: Cheapest OpenAI model. Ideal for classification, extraction, and high-volume simple tasks.

name: Qwen 3 30B-A3B
memo: 30B MoE with only 3B active. Extremely efficient inference. Runs fast on consumer GPUs.

name: Phi-4-mini
memo: 3.8B model with 128K context. Surprisingly capable for its size. Great for mobile/edge.

name: Gemma 3 12B
memo: Compact multimodal model from Google. Good balance of size and capability.

name: GPT-5
memo: First model in GPT-5 family. Major leap in reasoning and multimodal. 400K context window.

name: GPT-5.2
memo: GPT-5.2 with 128K output. Enhanced reasoning and coding. Stronger agentic capabilities.

name: GPT-5.4
memo: Latest GPT-5 iteration. State-of-the-art reasoning and coding. Released March 2026.

name: Claude Opus 4.6
memo: Most capable Claude model. 68.8% ARC-AGI-2. Exceptional coding and deep reasoning. Extended thinking support.

name: Claude Sonnet 4.6
memo: Best coding model in Claude family. 79.6% SWE-bench. Excellent speed-to-quality ratio.

name: Gemini 3 Pro
memo: Gemini 3 flagship with 1M context. Major upgrade in reasoning and multimodal. Native tool use.

name: Gemini 3 Flash
memo: Fast and capable. 78% SWE-bench at Flash-tier pricing. 1M context with built-in thinking.

name: Gemini 3.1 Pro
memo: Google latest flagship. 77.1% ARC-AGI-2. Best multimodal model available. Deep thinking with 1M context.

name: Grok 4
memo: Major upgrade over Grok 3. Strong reasoning with real-time data integration via X.

name: Grok 4.1
memo: #1 LMArena Elo 1483. 2M context window. Aggressive pricing at $0.20/$0.50 per million tokens.

name: DeepSeek V3.2
memo: Reasoning-first V3.2 with MIT license. Unified reasoning and chat. Near-frontier at fraction of cost.

name: Qwen 3.5 72B
memo: Dense 72B with strong reasoning. Apache 2.0 license. Best open-source dense model at this scale.

name: GLM-5
memo: 744B MoE with 40B active. Apache 2.0 open-source. 200K context. Strong Chinese language model.

name: Mistral Large 3
memo: Mistral flagship upgrade. Improved reasoning and multimodal. Strong European language support.

name: Llama 4 Behemoth
memo: Largest open model. 2T total params, 288B active. 16 experts. Frontier-level open-source model.
